overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a cargo vessel navigating through rough, stormy seas at dusk. The camera remains fixed on the bow as the ship pitches through heavy waves, with navigation monitors visible overhead and a dramatic wave impact occurring mid-sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge overlooking stormy open ocean

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the port side

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship forward through rough seas, maintaining course while the vessel pitches with the waves

entered.detail: three-screen console displaying GPS chart, rotating radar, and depth/speed indicators
industrial metal bow deck with anchor equipment and safety railings
metal safety railing along the port side of the bow
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the bow
dark choppy waves with whitecaps stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from the ship's bridge shows the vessel cutting through rough, dark seas under an overcast stormy sky. Navigation monitors glow overhead while the bow pitches rhythmically with the waves. A flash of lightning briefly illuminates the water to the left as the ship maintains steady forward progress.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge during heavy wave impact

events.description: large wave crashes directly over the bow, completely obscuring the forward view with white spray and water
wave spray dissipates and visibility returns as the ship emerges from the wave

agents.ego_description: maintaining ship heading as a large wave impacts the bow, causing heavy spray to wash over the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: A massive wave strikes the bow, sending a wall of white spray crashing over the deck and completely obscuring the forward view. The navigation monitors remain visible at the top of the frame while the bridge windows are covered in water. As the spray clears, the bow deck re-emerges from the foam.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge continuing through rough seas

agents.ego_description: continuing steady course through rough seas, with the ship pitching regularly as it cuts through the waves

entered.detail: dark choppy waves with whitecaps stretching to the horizon
industrial metal bow deck with anchor equipment and safety railings

segments.scene_description: Following the wave impact, the ship continues its steady progress through the stormy seas. The bow rises and falls with the heavy swell while the navigation monitors display constant data overhead. The vessel maintains its heading through the dark, churning waters as dusk settles over the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a violent storm that culminates in a massive wave impact. It begins with the vessel cutting through rough, dark seas under an overcast sky, where glowing navigation monitors frame the view as the bow pitches rhythmically and a flash of lightning illuminates the water. As the ship pushes forward, a massive wave suddenly strikes the bow, sending a wall of white spray crashing over the deck and completely obscuring the forward vision. The scene then shifts as the foam gradually clears, revealing the bow deck once more while the bridge windows drip with water. Finally, the vessel maintains its steady heading through the churning waters, rising and falling with the heavy swell as dusk settles over the horizon.
